heading: Research on intellectual disabilities
label: 285g–2 Research on intellectual disabilities
text: The Director of the Institute shall conduct and support research and related activities into the causes, prevention, and treatment of intellectual disabilities.
notes: Amendments2010— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “The Director of the Institute shall conduct and support research and related activities into the causes, prevention, and treatment of mental retardation.”Pub. L. 111–256
